auth.title: Welcome back
auth.subtitle: Sign in to your Insurance Broker System account

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back! Here's an overview of your agency's performance.

clients.title: Clients
clients.subtitle: Manage your client relationships and contacts.
clients.noClients: No clients found. Create your first client to get started.
clients.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or phone...

dialog.chooseType: Choose the type of client you want to add.
dialog.fillInfo: Fill in the required information to create the client.

policies.noPolicies: No policies found for this client.

toast.addressAdded: The address has been added successfully.
toast.primaryAddressUpdatedDesc: The address is now the primary address.

policies.title: Policies
policies.subtitle: Manage insurance policies, coverages, and endorsements.
policies.noResults: No policies found. Create your first policy to get started.

wizard.title: New Policy
wizard.createAndBindHint: Add at least one coverage to bind the policy immediately.

carrier.noProducts: No active products available for this carrier.

details.policyNumberHint: Leave empty to auto-generate a policy number

toast.createdDesc: The policy has been created as a draft.
toast.createdAndBoundDesc: The policy has been created and bound successfully.

detail.bindHint: Add at least one coverage before binding.

coverages.coverageAddedDesc: {{name}} has been added to the policy.

endorsements.premiumChangeHint: Enter a negative number for premium reduction
endorsements.endorsementAddedDesc: The endorsement has been submitted for approval.

detail.noResponses: No carriers have been added to this quote yet.

claims.title: Claims
claims.subtitle: Manage insurance claims and track their lifecycle.

fnol.title: File New Claim (FNOL)
fnol.subtitle: First Notice of Loss
fnol.policyIdHint: The policy under which this claim is being filed.
fnol.clientIdHint: The insured party filing the claim.
fnol.lossDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the loss in detail (minimum 10 characters)...

toast.filedDesc: The claim has been created successfully.

detail.noNotes: No notes have been added yet.

commissions.title: Commissions
commissions.subtitle: Manage commission statements and schedules.
commissions.statementsSearchPlaceholder: Search by statement number or carrier...
commissions.schedulesSearchPlaceholder: Search by carrier or line of business...

newStatement.title: New Commission Statement
newStatement.description: Record a new commission statement received from a carrier.

newSchedule.title: New Commission Schedule
newSchedule.description: Define commission rates for a carrier and line of business.

lineItemsTab.noLineItems: No line items have been added yet.

producerSplitsTab.noLineItemsForSplits: Add line items first to assign producer splits.

addLineItemDialog.title: Add Line Item
addLineItemDialog.description: Add a new commission line item to this statement.

disputeDialog.title: Dispute Line Item
disputeDialog.description: Provide a reason for disputing this line item.

addSplitDialog.title: Add Producer Split
addSplitDialog.description: Assign a producer split for this line item.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Commission and producer reports
reports.noData: No data available for the selected period.

templatesPage.title: Document Templates
templatesPage.subtitle: Manage Handlebars templates for document generation.
templatesPage.noTemplates: No templates found. Create one to get started.

editorDialog.description: Write Handlebars HTML. Use placeholders for dynamic values.
editorDialog.name: Name

coi.title: Generate Certificate of Insurance
coi.description: Search for a policy to generate a COI PDF using the {{name}} template. The generated PDF will open automatically.
coi.policyHint: Policy details will be used to populate the certificate.
coi.generateError: Failed to generate COI. Verify the policy is active.

importDialog.title: Import Template from PDF
importDialog.stepUpload: Upload a PDF certificate to generate a Handlebars template with AI.
importDialog.stepPreview: Review and edit the generated template before saving.
importDialog.dropZone: Click or drag a PDF file here
importDialog.takesAMinute: This may take up to a minute.

aiEditDialog.title: AI Edit: {{name}}
aiEditDialog.stepInput: Describe the changes you want to make to the template.
aiEditDialog.stepPreview: Review the AI changes before applying them.
aiEditDialog.instructionPlaceholder: e.g. "Make the header blue and increase the font size to 14pt" or "Add a signature line at the bottom"
aiEditDialog.takesAMinute: This may take up to a minute.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage users, roles, and system configuration.

users.title: Users

dialog.description: Define the role name and description.
dialog.name: Role Name

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.systemRoleReadOnly: System role permissions cannot be modified.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.subtitle: Track all entity changes across the system.

dialog.title: Create Tenant
dialog.name: Name

policyAssistant.title: Policy Assistant
policyAssistant.description: Use AI to gather policy information through conversation and create policies automatically.

newConversation.title: New Conversation
newConversation.description: Choose a conversation mode and optionally specify the line of business.

chat.emptyState: Start by describing the policy you want to create.
chat.placeholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)

createPolicy.buttonDisabledTitle: Complete all required fields before creating a policy
createPolicy.dialogDescription: Review the AI-extracted details and select the client and carrier before creating the policy.
createPolicy.requiredDescription: Client, carrier, line of business, and dates are required.
createPolicy.successDescription: The policy has been created successfully.
